'''Archimar''' was a military [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]] in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]]. During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], Archimar was attached to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] ''[[Glorious]]''. The doctor would later be assigned to the [[Intrepid (Endurance-class)|''Intrepid'']] as surgeon.
